label: Eye
quick_take: Eye cancer is almost entirely uveal melanoma in the West and retinoblastoma in the Global South. The striking CI5 finding is the East-African signal — Malawi Blantyre, Zimbabwe Harare, Bulawayo — where eye-cancer ASRs are 10–20× the world median, almost certainly driven by HIV-related ocular surface squamous neoplasia (OSSN), not melanoma.

findings.title: Malawi Blantyre women, vol X: ASR 9.81, 20× the world median
findings.text: By far the top spatial outlier. Malawi men vol X 7.43 (13×); Zimbabwe Harare women vol XI 5.76 (13×); Zimbabwe Bulawayo men vol XII 5.20 (13×). This is the OSSN (HIV-associated ocular surface squamous neoplasia) epidemic, visible in CI5.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Malawi Blantyre women, vol X: ASR 9.81, 20× the world median

findings.title: Zimbabwe Harare African women inverted-U
findings.text: 0.42 (vol VII) → 5.76 (vol XI) → 2.89 (vol XII). The rise phase matches the HIV epidemic, the fall matches ART roll-out. Astonishingly clean.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Zimbabwe Harare African women inverted-U

findings.title: Bimodal age curves in most large US female populations
findings.text: peak in older ages but a secondary bump in middle age. This is the mix of retinoblastoma (early band) and uveal melanoma (older) + OSSN, though OSSN dominates the adult low-age signal.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Bimodal age curves in most large US female populations

findings.title: Japanese / Korean women: early-age peak at band 1 (0–4)
findings.text: Retinoblastoma-dominant population distribution. India Tamil Nadu and USA Black women also have a band-1 peak, consistent with retinoblastoma.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Japanese / Korean women: early-age peak at band 1 (0–4)

findings.text: Very small numbers for most registries. The African numbers are robust because they are large relative to the small Western denominators.
Eye cancer aggregates retinoblastoma, uveal melanoma, OSSN, orbital lymphoma — without histology split, cross-registry comparison is perilous.

findings.title: The HIV-OSSN signal in Malawi / Zimbabwe is the most publishable finding on this site
findings.text: Paired with HIV prevalence / ART timelines, the inverted-U in Harare African women could be a compact visual proof of ART impact on this cancer.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — The HIV-OSSN signal in Malawi / Zimbabwe is the most publishable finding on this site

findings.text: The adult band-1 peak in Japanese / Korean women should be decomposed into retinoblastoma age breakdown — a clean paper on "retinoblastoma age distribution over the CI5 era" could come out of this.
